name: mac-sentinel-electron
description: Local-first macOS security triage app with a Python scan engine, React renderer, and Electron desktop shell.
author: OpenAI

scripts.backend:install: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
scripts.app:dir: vite build && python3 scripts/build_backend.py --mode dir && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:mac: vite build && python3 scripts/build_backend.py --mode package && electron-builder --mac zip -c.mac.identity=null
scripts.dist: vite build && python3 scripts/build_backend.py --mode package && electron-builder
